headline: GM clinches NASA contract to build battery for moon-bound vehicle
summary: GM is a subcontractor in the development of the highly advanced “Eagle” Lunar Terrain Vehicle that uses technology shared with GM’s Earth vehicles.

headline: Leidos (LDOS) Selected for $10B “Evolve” Contract to Modernize US State Department IT Systems
summary: Leidos Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) is one of the cheap NYSE stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 21, Leidos was selected to modernize global IT systems for the US Department of State under the “Evolve” contract.
